secondary_archetype: Technical PM (web experimentation and analytics focus)

seniority.level: Senior / Staff IC (implied by comp range and first-PM-in-function scope)
level_signals: 10+ years of experience listed under preferred qualifications
First web PM in function — expected to shape strategy and roadmap without existing playbook
Comp range $305K-$385K base consistent with Staff/Senior PM at Anthropic
Presenting strategy and results to executive audiences

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong strategic thinking abilities, with the ability to translate Anthropic's business goals into a clear, prioritized web roadmap that aligns with broader marketing and product strategy
Track record of driving measurable business results through the web in competitive, fast-moving markets
A strong point of view on what makes the web a category-defining channel for a technology company
A track record of running experimentation programs that moved meaningful business metrics, with a clear ROI story rather than just a backlog of A/B tests
Setting strategy for localized web experiences and workflows across various regions and languages
Strong quantitative instincts and fluency with analytics tools, funnel modeling, and experimentation design
Experience operating at the seam between Marketing, Design, and Engineering, with the ability to influence without owning and say no to requests that won't move the needle
Excellent prioritization judgment and cross-functional gravity — you can walk into a room of competing stakeholders and leave it aligned on what's shipping and why
A collaborative, low-ego operating style that treats design craft and growth performance as compatible rather than opposing goals
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with comfort presenting strategy and results to executive audiences
Deep interest in AI and its potential to positively impact how people work, learn, and create
Bachelor's degree or an equivalent combination of education, training, and/or experience

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience in web product management, web growth, digital strategy, CRO, or web experimentation at consumer or B2B technology companies
In-depth knowledge of technical SEO and site architecture
A background marketing AI, developer, or other technical products to both consumer and enterprise audiences
Fluency shipping and optimizing localized web experiences across international markets
A history of partnering closely with in-house brand and design teams on high-craft marketing sites
Led large, cross-functional web initiatives with measurable impact on conversion and brand perception

scope.surface: claude.com marketing and acquisition web properties
scope.business_model: B2C and B2B SaaS (prosumer and enterprise Claude subscriptions)
primary_metrics_inferred: Conversion rate across acquisition, signup, and checkout funnels
Funnel reporting and growth decisions speed
core_responsibilities: Own the web experience strategy for claude.com, setting the vision for how marketing surfaces work together as a portfolio
Stand up and lead the web experimentation program across claude.com
Drive conversion rate optimization across acquisition, signup, and checkout funnels
Establish web analytics foundation with Data Science, ensuring instrumentation, dashboards, and funnel reporting
Lead international and localization strategy for the web
Partner with Growth Product, Data, and Enterprise Marketing to build tooling, instrumentation, and funnel infrastructure
Collaborate with SEO and paid channel owners on on-page requirements and landing page experiments
Coordinate and prioritize inbound web requests from stakeholders against growth impact
Build and communicate a durable measurement story for the web to marketing and executive leadership

compensation.equity_form: optional equity donation matching mentioned (suggests options/RSUs are part of package)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and highly competitive ($305K-$385K base)
Visa sponsorship explicitly offered (with reasonable caveats)
First-in-function role with clear ownership of a high-impact surface (claude.com)
Encourages applications even from candidates who don't meet every qualification
Broad cross-functional mandate gives PM significant visibility and influence
Clear articulation of responsibilities and success metrics
red_flags: Hybrid policy requires at least 25% office time in San Francisco — eliminates fully-remote candidates
First web PM in function means no existing playbook, processes, or team infrastructure — high ambiguity
10+ years of experience listed under 'preferred' but the scope and comp strongly imply it is effectively required
Very broad remit (strategy, experimentation, analytics, localization, SEO, CRO, stakeholder management) may indicate under-resourcing or unclear team structure
